creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Sun Apr 13 02:41:30 2014
New Revision: 351178
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351178
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351178/

Log:
  - Update to 0.5.2
  - Assign maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		ports/188300
  Submitted by:	Michael Moll <kvedulv@kvedulv.de>
  Security:	CVE-2014-0135

Modified:
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo/Makefile
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/rubygem-kafo/files/patch-gemspec   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/rubygem-kafo/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/rubygem-kafo/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 02:37:17 2014	(r351177)
+++ head/devel/rubygem-kafo/Makefile	Sun Apr 13 02:41:30 2014	(r351178)
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	kafo
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.0
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.2
 CATEGORIES=	devel ruby
 MASTER_SITES=	RG
 
-MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	kvedulv@kvedulv.de
 COMMENT=	Ruby framework to create installers
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv3
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-clamp>=0.6.2:${PORT
 		rubygem-highline>=1.6.21:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-highline \
 		rubygem-logging>=1.8.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-logging \
 		rubygem-powerbar>=1.0.11:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-powerbar \
-		rubygem-kafo_parsers>=0.0.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers \
+		rubygem-kafo_parsers>=0.0.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-kafo_parsers \
 		gsed:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/gsed
 
 USE_RUBY=	yes
